title: helleborine oxyglottis
intro: Helleborine oxyglottis, also known as the lady's fingers or lady's mantle orchid, is a species of orchid native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of helleborine oxyglottis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
